{{CargoRelic
|name=Treasure Island
|class_id=22175
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|birthday=06-27
|source=
|description=On Jun 27, 1883 AD, Stevenson officially released the book Treasure Island.<br>Treasure Island is an adventure novel by British novelist Stevenson that follows the story of a boy named Jim as he embarks on a journey to find a legendary treasure. Along the way, he battles ruthless pirates and quells a rebellion. Rumors abound that six treasures still remain buried on the island, drawing treasure hunters from far and wide.
|fame=47
|art=42
|fth=37
|civ=68
|tech=34
|ss1=Refine +1 White Gaia Material +3%<br>Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +80
|ss2=Refine +1 White Gaia Material +4%<br>Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +120
|ss3=Refine +1 White Gaia Material +5%<br>Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +160
|ss4=Refine +1 White Gaia Material +7%<br>Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +240
|ss5=Refine +1 White Gaia Material +9%<br>Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +320
|ss7=Refine +1 White Gaia Material +9%<br>Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +320<br>Per 30 Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +280 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Minion Sim Skill II.png|50px]]Place in Minion Sims: This Relic's CIV +10
|skill2=[[File:Minion Sim Skill II.png|50px]]Place in Minion Sims: In Minion Sims, Troop Wind DMG +30
}}
